title: Spicy Brazilian Crumble
description: A flavorful Brazilian-inspired dish with a spicy kick, topped with a crunchy crumble.

ingredients.name: Spicy Brazilian Pea Grains Mix
ingredients.notes: Available at local health food stores

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together Spicy Brazilian Pea Grains Mix, crumble, and butter until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and a pinch of salt (if using).
Pour the egg mixture over the grain mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes, until smooth.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired size.
Shape each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk.
Place the disks onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each.
Brush the tops with egg wash and sprinkle with a pinch of salt (if using).
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
